---
title: "HESA Open Data: A look at UK Higher Education"
date: 2026-04-15
description: "I had a look at the HESA open data"
image: ""
twitter-card:
  image: ""
open-graph:
  image: ""
categories:
  - social science
  - UKHE
  - open data
resources:
  - "img/*"
doi: ""
citation: true
draft: true
---

Last year, with a colleague from France, I started thinking about a project looking at data on students in higher education in the UK and France.
It turns out that some of the data we wanted is only available in the UK for a fee. 
So we applied for funding and did not get it. 
As we are figuring out where next to apply for funding, I thought I would look at the data that is openly accessible about UK universities.
